Summary: Unit Plan, which is a component of the Teach module in Microsoft 365 Copilot app for Education, helps instructors map out weeks of connected instruction in one place.
Personas: Educator: Teach provides educators with easy access to top AI tasks for preparing class content and curriculum. With no prompting or AI skills needed, you can bring your class details and materials to create ready to use materials for your classes.

School Leader: Teach is a secure, grounded environment you can provide to educators at no additional cost. Teach is already built to integrate with materials your institution has in OneDrive, SharePoint, and Teams. Educators can get started with Teach with little to no training.

Summary: The Microsoft Education LTI app makes LMS integrations seamless with a single, powerful tool to introduce new capabilities to streamline and simplify deployment. Educators and students can access Teams Assignments, OneNote Class Notebooks, and other Microsoft 365 tools directly from their LMS.
Personas: Educator: Educators can easily access Microsoft Teams Assignments and OneNote Class Notebooks directly from their LMS, streamlining their workflow and enhancing their teaching experience.

School Leader: School leaders can oversee and manage the integration of Microsoft 365 tools within the LMS, ensuring that the technology supports the school's educational goals and improves overall efficiency.

Student: Students can conveniently access their assignments and class materials from Microsoft Teams and OneNote Class Notebooks within their LMS, making it easier to stay organized and engaged with their coursework.

DemoTitle: PowerPoint Agent and Word Agent in Copilot Chat
Summary: The Word Agent lets a teacher describe a document and get back a finished Word file — with sections, tables, and formatting — saved straight to OneDrive. The teacher opens it in Word like any other document.  PowerPoint Agent does for slides what Word Agent does for documents. Describe the deck, optionally reference up to five files, and the agent generates a real .pptx with layouts and structure — saved to OneDrive, opens in PowerPoint like any other file. The biggest hook for the EDU audience: Both Agents work for every Microsoft 365 user, with or without a Copilot license. That includes every teacher on a Microsoft 365 A1, A3, or A5 license at no extra cost.
Personas: Educator: Turn a single short prompt and a notes file into a parent-ready unit overview. No formatting work. Or generate a full lecture deck from a single short prompt and a notes file. Reference up to five files at once for richer content.

School Leader: Teachers across the building produce consistent, professional documents with no new software to roll out. In addition, teachers spend less prep time on slide formatting and more time on the lesson. Consistent visual quality across classrooms.
<b>Student<b>: These agents work for students writing reports or creating presentations — same workflow, same OneDrive.

Summary: Learning Activities is a new Microsoft Education experience designed to help educators and students transform passive content into active learning. With just a few clicks, educators and students can now create engaging practice activities like flashcards directly from existing learning content.
Personas: Student: Practice concepts, prepare for tests, and build confidence through interactive activities. Students can create their own activities and take charge of their learning.
Educator: Quickly turn class content into engaging activities and share with students. Built‑in guardrails ensure learners develop understanding rather than rely on AI.
School Leader: Offer safe, responsible AI that isn’t open ended prompting and supports learning.

Summary: Teach in Microsoft 365 Copilot App provides an AI-powered workspace that streamlines planning, assessment, and differentiation. It reduces routine work, so educators can return their attention to understanding learners, adapting instruction, and building relationships.
Personas: Educator: Teach provides educators with easy access to top AI tasks for preparing class content and curriculum. With no prompting or AI skills needed, you can bring your class details and materials to create ready to use materials for your classes.

School Leader: Teach is a secure, grounded environment you can provide to educators at no additional cost. Teach is already built to integrate with materials your institution has in OneDrive, SharePoint, and Teams. Educators can get started with Teach with little to no training.

Summary: Copilot Chat in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint brings AI assistance directly into the tools educators and leaders already use every day. It helps users brainstorm, draft, and refine content, making document creation faster and more efficient.
Personas: Educator: Educators can draft and refine lesson materials in Word, analyze class data in Excel, and create clear, engaging slides in PowerPoint—using natural language prompts directly inside their documents. This reduces manual effort and helps turn ideas and data into classroom ready content faster.

School Leader: School leaders can quickly create reports, analyze trends, and build presentations for stakeholders using existing files and data. Copilot Chat helps leaders move from raw information to polished, decision ready outputs—without leaving Microsoft 365.

Summary: Search Progress helps the development of critical thinking and healthy online research habits within the structure of a school assignment.
Personas: Student: Search Progress provides students with a structured environment to practice online research skills. It encourages critical thinking by guiding students through the process of finding, evaluating, and citing sources effectively.

Educator: Educators can create assignments that incorporate Search Progress, allowing them to monitor student research habits and provide targeted feedback. This tool helps educators teach essential digital literacy skills in a controlled setting.

School Leader: School leaders can implement Search Progress across their institution to promote consistent research practices. It supports the development of students' information literacy, preparing them for academic success and responsible digital citizenship.

Summary: Agent Mode in Word lets Copilot work directly inside a document to turn rough drafts into polished, purpose built writing. Instead of rewriting content line by line, educators can give Copilot a goal—such as adapting for an audience, strengthening justification, or making a document decision ready—and Agent Mode plans and executes the edits in place, using the author’s own content.
Personas: Educator: Agent Mode helps educators move from notes to finished documents without starting over. Whether writing recommendation letters or requests for approval, educators can ask Copilot to organize, refine, and strengthen their existing draft—saving time and increasing clarity, professionalism, and impact.

School Leader: Agent Mode supports clearer, more reviewable documents from the start. By helping educators align structure, tone, and rationale to administrative expectations, Agent Mode reduces back and forth and makes proposals easier to evaluate and act on.

Summary: Minecraft lessons in the Teach Module allows an educator to gather ideas to teach interactive lessons using Minecraft Education. This is for any educator, even if you have never used Minecraft in the Classroom.
Personas: Educator: Teach provides educators with easy access to top AI tasks for preparing class content and curriculum. With no prompting or AI skills needed, you can bring your class details and materials to create ready to use materials for your classes.

School Leader: Teach is a secure, grounded environment you can provide to educators at no additional cost. Teach is already built to integrate with materials your institution has in OneDrive, SharePoint, and Teams. Educators can get started with Teach with little to no training.

Summary: Researcher in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app helps educators and school leaders explore complex questions and produce structured, source‑cited research reports in minutes.
Personas: Educator: Researcher helps educators quickly investigate topics like pedagogy, accessibility, or curriculum changes and turn scattered information into clear, citation backed summaries—without advanced search or AI skills.

School Leader: Researcher supports evidence based decisions by combining external research with internal Microsoft 365 content. Leaders can generate decision ready briefs to share with teams or boards, all within a secure, compliant environment.

Summary: Learning Zone is a new teaching and learning app in Windows. With Learning Zone, you can create interactive, personalized lessons in a few clicks.
Personas: Educator: Save time creating active, engaging, and personalized learning activities in a few clicks, and improve teaching through clear, actionable student insights.
Student: Learn the way that fits your needs, connects to your interests, and stay engaged through interactive experiences with gamified elements.
School Leader: Free educators to focus on what matters, while embedding research informed, personalized, and data driven practices into everyday classrooms.

Summary: Copilot Notebooks in Microsoft 365 Copilot is your AI-powered workspace to stay focused on what matters most. Bring together Copilot chats, Microsoft 365 files, OneNote pages, meeting notes, and links—all in one place.
Personas: Student: Organized notebook on a topic with interactive learning artifacts.
Educator: Organized notebook on a topic, with audio overview, Copilot chat, and also study guide, all to that can be shared with students (same copy for all students).
School Leader: Maximize value for institution with the M365 Copilot license.
